self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: R1 Ode Beyond Time: Normal/Skill/Burst hits each independently build their own DMG Bonus by 10% per hit (20% with Hexerei: Secret Rite — faster ramp only, same 60% cap), up to 60%, decaying 10%/s in combat. Modeled as a single synchronized stack count (1-6) applied to all three DMG types at once, assuming a sustained rotation keeps them all near the same stack level; the Hexerei variant only changes ramp speed, not the steady-state cap, so it isn't modeled separately.
